title: The Operating System: Role and Structure
summary: Describes the role of the OS as a resource manager, its dependence on hardware (especially interrupts), and its main components (kernel, drivers).
content_points: OS: program that manages hardware and software resources, links hardware to applications.
Provides services, supervises applications, and can take control on errors.
Requires hardware support – most importantly the interrupt system.
Main components: kernel (core logic) and drivers (device-specific modules).
learning_objectives: Describe the role of the operating system
Identify the main components of an OS
